name: create-agent-tui
description: Scaffold customizable TypeScript terminal UIs for OpenRouter agents using @openrouter/agent.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold TypeScript terminal interfaces for OpenRouter agents.
interface.longDescription: Use Create Agent TUI to generate a complete @openrouter/agent terminal harness with input styles, tool display modes, loaders, session persistence, slash commands, configurable tools, and optional server entry points.
defaultPrompt: Scaffold a TypeScript agent TUI with OpenRouter.
Add tools to this OpenRouter agent harness.
Customize the terminal UI for this agent.
